title: pombalia jefensis
intro: Pombalia jefensis, also known as Jefe's Pombalia, is a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical regions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pombalia jefensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant to aid in the removal of mucus and phlegm from the lungs. In traditional medicine, Pombalia jefensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the leaves and stems are steeped in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
